name: com.cupkekgames.gamesave
description: Generic save-manager pattern built on CupkekGames Data: GameSaveManager<TData,TMeta>, IGameSaveData, GameSaveDataSO, GameSaveMetadata, slot-based metadata, and lifecycle events. Serialization-agnostic — pair with com.cupkekgames.newtonsoft (or your own IDataSerializer) to persist saves.
